title: erigeron muralis
intro: Erigeron muralis, also known as the mountain fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Erigeron muralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Erigeron muralis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
